सद3य (46) वै\ािनक सिमित के अ1य - सद3य पदेन पवन अ]वाल, मु9य काय.पालक अिधकारी [िव\ापन-III/4/असा.89] MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th May, 2016 No. F. 2 (1) CAC/Enf-II/2013/FSSAI.- In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (1) of section 11 of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006 (34 of 2006), the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India is hereby establishes the Central Advisory Committee for the purpose of the said Act, consisting of Chairperson and the following Members for three years with effect from the date of publication in this notification, namely:- Appointed under sub-section (4) of Section 11: (1) Chief Executive Officer, Food Safety and Standards ...Chairperson Authority of India ex-officio Appointed under sub-section (2) of Section 11: Food Industry: (2) Ms. Nirupama Sharma, C/o PHD Chamber ...Member PHD House, 4/2 Siri Institutional Area, August Kranti Marg, New Delhi. (3) Shri Dharam Vir Malhan, C/o All India Food ...Member Processors Association, 206 Aurobindo Place, Aurobindo Marg, Hauz Khas, New Delhi-110 016. Agriculture: (4) Shri Ajay Jakhar, C/o Bharat Krishak Samaj ...Member -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC 4] A-1, Nizamuddin West, New Delhi. (5) Dr. T.P.Rajendran, ...Member 701A, Vasundhara Apartment, Plot No. 16, Sector 6, Dwarka, New Delhi -110075.
